property.name: ipAddress
property.description: Management IP address of the SONiC switch

property.name: baselines_path
property.description: Path on switch for golden baseline JSON files (default /etc/sonic/baselines)

property.name: use_checkpoint
property.description: Use SONiC config checkpoint/rollback for teardown (default true)

property.name: allow_missing_baseline
property.description: Allow setup when baseline file is missing (lab only, default false)

property.name: allow_sudo_run_command
property.description: Run runCommand with sudo when enabled (default false)

property.name: checkpoint_name
property.description: SONiC checkpoint name for rollback (default velocity_pre_reservation)

property.name: port_aliases
property.description: JSON map of Velocity port alias to SONiC EthernetN (e.g. {"Et1/1":"Ethernet0"})

property.name: port_aliases_file
property.description: Path on agent to JSON port alias file

property.name: defaultSpeedGbps
property.description: Default L1 speed (Gbps) for setConfig/setup when topology omits args (default 400)

property.name: defaultTemplate
property.description: Template label for setup audit trail (default RoCE-400G)
